title: Rotten Leather +
description: Makes leather renewable by cooking rotten flesh.
body:
![Large text saying rotten leather.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a9568dbf187e327baaa1244a861c726e53e61d4.png)
  This pack was made as a vanilla datapack for server and client side worlds to make leather renewable, and to make it less grindy to get a level thirty enchantment table.
- Turn rotten flesh into leather on a campfire, furnace or smoker.
- Works on vanilla minecraft servers.
